description:
Free IFC model viewer

BIMvision is a freeware IFC model viewer. It allows to view the virtual models coming from CAD systems like Revit, Archicad, BricsCAD BIM, Advance, DDS-CAD, Tekla, Nemetschek VectorWorks, Bentley, Allplan and others without necessity of having commercial licenses of these systems or having each of particular vendor’s viewer. BIMvision visualizes the BIM models created in IFC format 2×3 and 4.0. It has many built-in features and is the first viewer with plugin interface.
BIMvision is a tool extremely easy to use which will help you save time, money and energy invested in task implementation. BIMvision allows project participants to identify the problems and solve them still during the design phase. More efficient than ever circulation of information between the participants of the investment process and the optimization of working time are the biggest advantages of working with this tool.
- Separation of IfcAnnotation from IfcGrid in the interface
- Implementation of an option in Advanced options that controls the voice narrator reading table contents
- Standardization of the behavior of drop-down lists after selecting an option
- Additions and corrections to the handling of IFC files (IfcIndexedPolyCurve)
- Added IfcArchElement, IfcArchElementType, IfcBSplineWithKnots readouts for IfcTrimmedCurve
- Implementation of Drive mode
- Incorporated font size and alignment in IfcTextLiteralWithExtent
- Improved scaling of extended models
- Incorporated coordinates from IfcMapConversion in the calculation of the coordinate system origin
